facts_recovered_from_other_locations.significance: High. The single-unit investment range ($540,700–$869,860) EXCEEDS stockholder's equity by a factor of ~1.6x to ~2.5x. This directly corroborates the Franchisor's cover-page Special Risk #2 ('Financial Condition') and the Illinois initial-fee deferral requirement.
Size of franchisor operating entity. Rebates from suppliers ($33,821) represented <2% of total revenue.
